scripts.start:backup: node -e "const express = require('express'); const cors = require('cors'); const app = express(); app.use(cors({origin: true})); app.use(express.json()); app.get('/', (req, res) => res.json({status: 'OK', message: 'API running'})); app.get('/api/customers', (req, res) => res.json([{id: 1, name: 'Test Customer', gst_registered: true}])); app.get('/api/items', (req, res) => res.json([{id: 1, name: 'Test Item', price: 1000}])); app.listen(process.env.PORT || 5000, () => console.log('Server running'));"
